Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the flange and web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Full width between the extreme fibres of the flange and web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RootRadius.description: Fillet radius between inner face of the flange and inner face of the web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

ToeRadius.description: Fillet radius at the end of the flange and the end of the web. Value need to be smaller or equal than the flange and web thicknesses Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

MirrorAboutLocalZ.description: If true, the section is mirrored about its local z-axis, resulting in a backwards facing L-shape.

MirrorAboutLocalY.description: If true, the section is mirrored about its local y-axis, resulting in and upside down L-shape.

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
